response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio contains character dialogue and background music; no vocal songs with lyrics detected. 2. Reference JSON correctly identifies the lack of vocal music, so no external lyrics were used. 3. Transcribing spoken dialogue from Fuwawa, Mococo, and Kuro-chan. 4. Subtitles are precisely aligned with vocal bursts and split at pauses. 5. Prominent on-screen merchandise text and guest nameplates have been transcribed and translated.

subtitles.original: おしゃべりパピーMOCOCOぬいぐるみ
subtitles.english: Talking Puppy MOCOCO Plushie

subtitles.original: ギュッとすると、色々喋るよ！
subtitles.english: It'll say various things if you give it a squeeze!

subtitles.original: どんなボイスが出るか、お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Look forward to hearing what voices it has!

subtitles.original: We have the Fuwawa to GO Finger Puppet!
subtitles.english: We have the Fuwawa to GO Finger Puppet!

subtitles.original: They come with an extra Ruffians kigurumi costume to dress them up and bring them everywhere!
subtitles.english: They come with an extra Ruffians kigurumi costume to dress them up and bring them everywhere!

subtitles.original: FUWAWA to GO 指パペット
subtitles.english: FUWAWA to GO Finger Puppet

subtitles.original: どこでも一緒に連れていけるサイズで、着せ替えラフィアンズ衣装もありよ！
subtitles.english: Take it anywhere! Comes with a Ruffians costume!

subtitles.original: Finally, we have two different ASMR voice packs: "Back from a Fluffy Date" with Fuwawa...
subtitles.english: Finally, we have two different ASMR voice packs: "Back from a Fluffy Date" with Fuwawa...

subtitles.original: ...and "Sweet and Fuzzy Needy Puppy" from Mococo!
subtitles.english: ...and "Sweet and Fuzzy Needy Puppy" from Mococo!

subtitles.original: ASMRボイスは、英語と日本語、両方で収録してます！
subtitles.english: ASMR voices are recorded in English and Japanese!

subtitles.original: They make our hearts beat so fast!
subtitles.english: They make our hearts beat so fast!

subtitles.original: Be ready to blush when you take a listen to them!
subtitles.english: Be ready to blush when you take a listen to them!

subtitles.original: The merch is separated into two sets: Fuwawa's Birthday Merch and Mococo's Birthday Merch.
subtitles.english: The merch is separated into two sets: Fuwawa's Birthday Merch and Mococo's Birthday Merch.

subtitles.original: Full sets come with bonuses, including a Cheki-style card with a special bonus voice!
subtitles.english: Full sets come with bonuses, including a Cheki-style card with a special bonus voice!

subtitles.original: グッズはフワワセットとモココセットに分かれています。
subtitles.english: The merch is split into a Fuwawa set and a Mococo set.

subtitles.original: セットごとにチェキ風カードと特典ボイスが付きます。
subtitles.english: Each set comes with a Cheki-style card and bonus voice.

subtitles.original: The regular version will have a foil-stamped replica signature and message!
subtitles.english: The regular version will have a foil-stamped replica signature and message!

subtitles.original: 数量限定セットは直筆サイン入りだよ！
subtitles.english: The limited edition set comes with a handwritten signature!

subtitles.original: We put lots of love into each signature, so we hope you look forward to it!
subtitles.english: We put lots of love into each signature, so we hope you look forward to it!

subtitles.original: たくさん愛情込めてサイン書きますね！
subtitles.english: We'll put lots of love into writing the signatures!

subtitles.original: Check out the hololive official shop and look for the link in the description or comments!
subtitles.english: Check out the hololive official shop and look for the link in the description or comments!

subtitles.original: ぜひホロライブ公式ショップをチェックしてください！
subtitles.english: Please check out the hololive official shop!

subtitles.original: バウバウ！
subtitles.english: Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: What did you think of our birthday merch? Pretty cute, huh?
subtitles.english: What did you think of our birthday merch? Pretty cute, huh?

subtitles.original: Reservations go on sale right after the birthday live ends, so don't forget!
subtitles.english: Reservations go on sale right after the birthday live ends, so don't forget!

subtitles.original: 生誕のグッズの予約はこの後開始しますので、
subtitles.english: Reservations for the birthday merch will start after this,

subtitles.original: お忘れずにチェックしてください！
subtitles.english: so please don't forget to check them out!

subtitles.original: Use the link below or on the side here! Don't forget, okay?
subtitles.english: Use the link below or on the side here! Don't forget, okay?

subtitles.original: We put a lot of love into it, and Ikomochi-mama too!
subtitles.english: We put a lot of love into it, and Ikomochi-mama too!

subtitles.original: Right after this ends, time to go, go, go!
subtitles.english: Right after this ends, time to go, go, go!

subtitles.original: Go buy it!
subtitles.english: Go buy it!

subtitles.original: Well, we performed a lot of special collab songs with our dear Senpai...
subtitles.english: Well, we performed a lot of special collab songs with our dear Senpai...

subtitles.original: ...but there's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet, right?
subtitles.english: ...but there's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet, right?

subtitles.original: そう！まだ会ってない謎のゲストが一人いるんだよ！
subtitles.english: Right! There's still one mystery guest we haven't met yet!

subtitles.original: Well, shall we give the Ruffians a hint?
subtitles.english: Well, shall we give the Ruffians a hint?

subtitles.original: Ruffians are curious, why?
subtitles.english: Ruffians are curious, why?

subtitles.original: コブダイ？
subtitles.english: Napoleonfish?

subtitles.original: ヤゴーさん？
subtitles.english: Yago-san?

subtitles.original: That's a good guess maybe, but... well, see, huh?
subtitles.english: That's a good guess maybe, but... well, see, huh?

subtitles.original: Maybe you should get ready, because, you know...
subtitles.english: Maybe you should get ready, because, you know...

subtitles.original: ...they aren't quite as bad as Pero, but they can get pretty nasty!
subtitles.english: ...they aren't quite as bad as Pero, but they can get pretty nasty!

subtitles.original: Mococo-chan, don't be rude to our next guest, okay?
subtitles.english: Mococo-chan, don't be rude to our next guest, okay?

subtitles.original: Especially before calling them out!
subtitles.english: Especially before calling them out!

subtitles.original: We'll see!
subtitles.english: We'll see!

subtitles.original: Well, let's get them out here then! Who could it be?
subtitles.english: Well, let's get them out here then! Who could it be?

subtitles.original: Okay! せーの！どうぞー！
subtitles.english: Okay! One, two! Come on out!

subtitles.original: わわわわわ！きたしんよ！きたしんよ！
subtitles.english: Wa-wa-wa-wa-wa! He's here-shun! He's here-shun!

subtitles.original: バッキュン！
subtitles.english: Bakkyun!

subtitles.original: チュッチュ！
subtitles.english: Chu-chu!

subtitles.original: 自己紹介お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please introduce yourself!

subtitles.original: クロちゃんです！わわわわわー！
subtitles.english: I'm Kuro-chan! Wa-wa-wa-wa-wa!

subtitles.original: 日本の芸人 安田大サーカス クロちゃん
subtitles.english: Japanese Comedian Yasuda Dai Circus Kuro-chan

subtitles.original: 初めまして！
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: チワワじゃないよ！フワワだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm not a Chihuahua! I'm Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: フワワじゃないよ！モココだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm not Fuwawa! I'm Mococo!

subtitles.original: 2人合わせて、フワモコです！
subtitles.english: Together, we are FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: フワモコのわちゃわちゃバースデーフェスティバルに来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thanks for coming to FuwaMoco's Birthday Festival!

subtitles.original: ハッピーバースデーだしんよ！フワモコ！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday-shun, FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: いいしんねー！
subtitles.english: It's great-shun!

subtitles.original: 視聴者のラフィアンズはたくさんいると思いますけど、
subtitles.english: I'm sure many Ruffians are watching,

subtitles.original: クロちゃんがどんな人なのか説明してもらえますか？
subtitles.english: but could you explain who you are, Kuro-chan?

subtitles.original: 自分ですんの？それ。
subtitles.english: I have to do it myself?

subtitles.original: Introduction!
subtitles.english: Introduction!

subtitles.original: わかったしんよ。海外の人も見てますもんね。
subtitles.english: Got it-shun. Overseas people are watching too.

subtitles.original: 海外の人もわかる自己紹介しますからね。
subtitles.english: I'll do an intro they can understand.

subtitles.original: Nice to meet you, chu, chu, chu, chu, tulip!
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you, chu, chu, chu, chu, tulip!

subtitles.original: え、クロちゃんは…チューリップ？
subtitles.english: Um, Kuro-chan is... a tulip?

subtitles.original: チューリップ、ノー、ノー、ノー！
subtitles.english: Tulip, no, no, no!

subtitles.original: ちゃんとまだわからないかもしれないから。
subtitles.english: They might not understand yet.

subtitles.original: 安田大サーカスっていうトリオを組んでる芸人さんで、
subtitles.english: I'm a comedian in a trio called Yasuda Dai Circus,

subtitles.original: 豆柴の大群のプロデューサーや作詞もしてます、クロちゃんです！
subtitles.english: and producer for Mameshiba no Taigun. I'm Kuro-chan!

subtitles.original: おー！バウバウ！
subtitles.english: Oh! Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: じゃあ今回は英語でお願いします！
subtitles.english: Now, in English please!

subtitles.original: In English?
subtitles.english: In English?

subtitles.original: 僕が？ 自分？
subtitles.english: Me? Myself?

subtitles.original: えー、そんなこと急に言われたら… It's shy! Flower!
subtitles.english: Uh, if you say that all of a sudden... It's shy! Flower!
